findings.summary: Subtask 4 tactical live-dialog coverage is only partially enforced because TacticalDamageSummaryGUI and ICM interaction tests are unregistered dead code.
BattleSimFrame and LocalGameDialog launch tests do not prove their downstream child modals opened, weakening Subtask 6 ownership/lifetime evidence.
GuiHarnessTest still smoke-tests pumpEvents() without asserting observable event dispatch.
Historical Subtask 2, 3, and 5 verifier notes were reviewed and do not change the final feature-level outcome.

follow_up_feature_requests: Register and execute the existing TacticalGuiLiveTest cases for TacticalDamageSummaryGUI and ICM assignment interaction, then narrow or refresh tactical GUI documentation so it matches the tests that actually run in GuiTests.

Strengthen BattleSimGuiLiveTest so BattleSimFrame and LocalGameDialog assertions verify LocalGameDialog, ScenarioDialog, and ScenarioEditorGUI actually open before auto-dismiss, making early-return/no-op regressions fail automatically.
